message:
Remove dead 3-way merge code and update stale comments

Remove the attemptAutoMerge stub in import.go that always returned an error,
and the entire code path that called it. When conflict markers are detected,
immediately show manual resolution guidance instead of misleading users.

Update 7 stale comments in syncbranch/worktree.go that still referenced the
removed 3-way merge engine.

Closes: bd-ihfav
